languages.text: "Что ж, не самый худший способ получить власть. По крайней мере, не такой разрушительный, как бунт".

traits.locale_text: "Что ж, не самый худший способ получить власть. По крайней мере, не такой разрушительный, как бунт".

languages.text: "Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."
languages.original_text: "Что ж, не самый худший способ получить власть. По крайней мере, не такой разрушительный, как бунт".

traits.locale_text: "Not the worst way to gain power, I suppose. Less destructive than a riot, at least."
"Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."
"Not the worst way to gain power, I suppose. Less destructive than a coup, at least."
"Not the worst way to gain power, I suppose. Less destructive than a riot, at least."
"Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."
"Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."

languages.text: 「権力を得るやり方としては最悪ってわけでもないな。少なくともクーデターほど破壊的じゃない」
languages.original_text: "Not the worst way to gain power, I suppose. Less destructive than a coup, at least."

traits.locale_text: 権力を得るやり方としては最悪ってわけでもないな。少なくともクーデターほど破壊的じゃない。

languages.text: « Disons que ce n'est pas la pire méthode pour prendre le pouvoir. Cela fait moins de ravages qu'une révolte, en tout cas. »
languages.original_text: "Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."

traits.locale_text: « Disons que ce n'est pas la pire méthode pour prendre le pouvoir. Cela fait moins de ravages qu'une révolte, en tout cas. »

languages.text: "Gücü ele geçirmenin en kötü yolu sayılmaz sanırım. En azından isyan kadar yıkıcı değil."
languages.original_text: "Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."

traits.locale_text: "Gücü ele geçirmenin en kötü yolu sayılmaz sanırım. En azından isyan kadar yıkıcı değil."

languages.text: «No es la peor forma de asumir el poder, supongo. Causa menos estragos que una rebelión, al menos».
languages.original_text: "Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."

traits.locale_text: «No es la peor forma de asumir el poder, supongo. Causa menos estragos que una rebelión, al menos».

languages.text: “这种夺权方式还不算是最糟的。至少比叛乱破坏性小。”
languages.original_text: "Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."

traits.locale_text: “这种夺权方式还不算是最糟的。至少比叛乱破坏性小。”

languages.text: "Vermutlich nicht der schlechteste Weg, Macht zu erringen. Jedenfalls weniger zerstörerisch als ein Aufstand."
languages.original_text: "Not the worst way to take power, I suppose. Less destructive than a rebellion, at least."

traits.locale_text: "Vermutlich nicht der schlechteste Weg, Macht zu erringen. Jedenfalls weniger zerstörerisch als ein Aufstand."
